text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Don't hang around here chirping. Beat it.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Nooooo! I wanna race you, Brian! I even wrote
you a letter challenging you to a duel thingy!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Is that what that was?! I couldn't read it, the
spelling was so bad.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Gyah!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Look at you, the very picture of fighting spirit.
What has inspired this?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I lost to Brian earlier and I'm sooooo
disappointed!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That's no reason to shoot an arrow with a letter
on it at me. And then you come barging into the
student council office...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...I don't see the problem. Why not accept the
challenge?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Unyielding in the face of struggle... As one aims
for increasingly magnificent heights, there will
never be a dearth of insights to gain.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Yayyy! I don't really get it, but leeeet's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Geez... She doesn't even listen when people are
talking. Guess I've got no choice.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! Turbo boooost!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(I suspected there was no thought put into this,
but...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(She's launching herself forward at full power
from the very start!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(Why is that? Does she know no fear? And this
running style is—)

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huff, pant...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Waaaaahhh! I lost again!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You got a busted limiter or something?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Busted millimeter? Wh-what do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Did I do somethin' wrong? I was runnin' as hard as
I could!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I bet. You sure broke the limits in a big way.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It was an interesting race. ...Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... y-you're welcome?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From that day forward, Narita Brian polishes her
running style, making herself into an even more
fearsome opponent.
